Name: Michigan Human Anesthesia fMRI Dataset-1
Acknowledgements: This work was supported by the National Institute of General Medical Sciences of the National Institutes of Health (grant R01GM103894; PIs: A.G.H. and Z.H.).
ReferencesAndLinks: Huang, Z. et al. Brain imaging reveals covert consciousness during behavioral unresponsiveness induced by propofol. Sci Rep 8, 13195 (2018). DOI: 10.1038/s41598-018-31436-z
Huang, Z. et al. Anterior insula regulates brain network transitions that gate conscious access. Cell Rep 35, 109081 (2021). DOI: 10.1016/j.celrep.2021.109081
Huang, Z. et al. Asymmetric neural dynamics characterize loss and recovery of consciousness. Neuroimage 236, 118042 (2021). DOI: 10.1016/j.neuroimage.2021.118042
HowToAcknowledge:
Please cite the following papers for reusing of the dataset

EthicsApprovals: All procedures were approved by the University of Michigan IRB. Participants gave written informed consent. Data have been fully de-identified and defaced in compliance with HIPAA guidelines.
